_shorthelp: PhotoGallery displays a slideshow of images. jqWidgets (Commercial)
photostyle: width: 90%; height: 90%; background-color: #000; background-position: center; background-repeat: no-repeat;

_photostyle.desc: Sets the style settings for PhotosGallery

_photos.desc: List of photos to display, separated by commas.

_animationDuration.desc: Sets or gets the animationDuration property. Specifies the duration of the animation which starts when the current page is changed.

_buttonsOffset.desc: Sets or gets the photoGallery buttonsOffset property. This property sets the offset from the default location of the navigation buttons.

_showButtons.desc: Sets or gets whether the navigation buttons are visible.

_slideShow.desc: Indicates whether the slideShow mode is enabled. In this mode, pages are changed automatically in a time interval.

_slideDuration.desc: Sets or gets the duration in milliseconds of a time interval. The current page is changed when the time interval is elapsed.

_csstemplate: photo {{width: 100%; height: 100%; background-color: #000; background-position: center;background-repeat: no-repeat; }}
